overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking alongside a horse through a foggy forest at night, illuminated by a lantern. The scene transitions from dense woodland to a rocky stream bank.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path while leading a horse, illuminated by a lantern

notable_agents.action: piebald horse walking alongside the character, matching pace on the narrow trail

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with grass edges
atmospheric fog hanging between trees reducing visibility
grass and shrubs lining the sides of the forest path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character walking through a dense, foggy forest at night, accompanied by a horse. The narrow dirt trail is flanked by tall pine trees and thick undergrowth, with mist reducing visibility. The lantern illuminates the immediate path ahead as they proceed steadily forward.

events.description: forest opens up to reveal a rocky stream running alongside the path on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path next to the stream, carefully guiding the horse over uneven rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: horse navigating carefully along the uneven stream bank, occasionally looking toward the water

entered.detail: narrow stream with visible water flowing over rocks alongside the path
rocky terrain and boulders lining the edge of the stream
large moss-covered rocks scattered along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to reveal a rocky stream flowing on the right side, with the character and horse walking along the bank. Large boulders and rocky outcrops replace the dense undergrowth, while the forest continues on the left. The lantern light reflects off the water and rocks as they navigate the uneven terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, nocturnal forest that gradually opens up to a rocky stream bank. It begins on a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and thick undergrowth, where heavy mist limits visibility to the immediate glow of a lantern. As the character and horse proceed steadily forward, the oppressive woodland begins to recede, allowing the path to expand. The scene then shifts as the dense foliage gives way to a rocky shoreline, with the lantern light reflecting off a flowing stream and large boulders on the right. Finally, the camera tracks the pair as they navigate this uneven terrain, moving from the claustrophobic forest into the more open landscape of the riverbank.
